founder.title: Local expertise, globally polished.
founder.body: I moved to Valencia six years ago and lived every step of the relocation process myself. SettleInValencia exists to make sure your first weeks here are spent at the beach, not in queues at the Oficina de Extranjería.
founder.name: Elena Martínez

how.title: How SettleInValencia works
how.subtitle: A guided, three-stage path from your first question to keys in hand.

details.assessment: A 6-step intake captures your nationality, family situation, work status, arrival timeline and goals. We translate that into the visa pathway and priorities that fit you.
details.roadmap: Our AI generates a Valencia-specific roadmap: tasks grouped by visa, housing, banking, healthcare, tax and lifestyle, with realistic durations and the right order.
details.dashboard: Track every task, mark progress, surface recommendations, and book a human expert when a step needs hands-on help.

about.title: Built by someone who's done it.
about.subtitle: SettleInValencia combines local knowledge with technology so your move feels like a beginning, not a battle.
story: I founded SettleInValencia after watching too many friends spend their first months in Spain stuck in paperwork instead of on the beach.

We pair an AI relocation engine — trained on the specific requirements of Valencia, the Comunidad Valenciana and Spanish national bureaucracy — with a curated network of local lawyers, gestores, real estate partners and tax advisors.
Our promise is simple: clarity, calm, and the confidence that nothing slips through the cracks.
